title: Sour Fluffy Chocolate Chips Stir-fry
description: A comforting Egyptian dish featuring sour roasted chocolate chips cooked with a mix of fresh vegetables and spices for a delightful blend of textures and flavors.
instructions: Place the chocolate chips in a baking dish and roast for 5 minutes until they turn slightly darker.
In a wok or frying pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped onions and cook until translucent.
Add tomato paste and stir to combine with the onions. Then add cumin seeds, coriander seeds, and green chilies. Stir for about 1 minute.
Toss in roasted chocolate chips along with sour cream. Season with salt to taste. Continue stirring for an additional minute or until everything is well combined.
Serve hot as a dessert or snack.
